title: spergella glabra
intro: Spergella glabra is a type of flowering plant, also known as the Indian spurge, that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Spergella glabra include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
